$comment: Per-category debug log toggles. Edit and rebuild to flip. Categories are: tools (per-turn dynamic intent tools injected), rooms (room moves), anthropic (cache hit/miss + token usage from the Anthropic client), provider (token + cache usage from the OpenAI-compatible client — OpenAI/xAI/Gemini), view (the per-turn tool_result payload + [Current view] block sent to the LLM — verbose, for spotting narrator hallucination), thinking (extended-thinking blocks — also enables thinking on the API request itself, so this flag carries a real per-turn token cost when on). Set to false to silence that category. Independent of the Debug header button (which controls slash-command intercepts, not logs).
